testimonials.title: What shippers say after the first delivery — and the hundredth

items.quote: We switched our entire North India distribution to Shipmate eighteen months ago. Our stock-out incidents dropped by a third within one quarter, simply because trucks stopped arriving late.
items.name: Rohan Mehta

items.quote: Cold chain compliance is non-negotiable for us. Shipmate's reefer fleet gives us live temperature logs on every trip, which has made our audits dramatically easier.
items.name: Dr. Anjali Rao

items.quote: Their dispatch team treats every shipment like it's the only one on the road. Communication is proactive, not something we have to chase.
items.name: Suresh Iyer

ctaBanner.title: Ready to move your next consignment?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Tell us your route and load type — our team responds with a quote within two working hours.

hero.title: Reliable freight, built on a foundation of precision.
hero.subtitle: Shipmate Logistics is a pan-India freight network with a fleet of 1000+ vehicles across six regional hubs. We move cargo with discipline, transparency, and a relentless focus on on-time delivery.

story.title: Connecting Possibilities. Delivering Excellence.
paragraphs: At Shipmate Logistics Private Limited, we believe logistics is not just about transporting goods—it's about delivering trust, enabling business growth, and building lasting partnerships. Every shipment we handle represents a promise of reliability, precision, and excellence.

Established with a vision to redefine logistics through transparency, efficiency, and customer-centric service, Shipmate Logistics is dedicated to providing seamless transportation solutions that businesses can depend on. From full truckload (FTL) and part-load (PTL) services to customized logistics solutions, we combine operational expertise with meticulous planning to ensure every consignment reaches its destination safely, securely, and on time.

What sets us apart is our leadership-driven approach. Backed by years of practical industry experience, our team possesses in-depth expertise in transportation management, freight operations, supply chain coordination, and customer relationship management. We understand that every business has unique logistics requirements, which is why we deliver tailored solutions designed to optimize efficiency, reduce transportation costs, and ensure uninterrupted supply chain performance.

At Shipmate Logistics, we measure our success by the success of our customers. Through proactive planning, transparent communication, and a commitment to operational excellence, we strive to eliminate common logistics challenges such as shipment delays, coordination gaps, and service uncertainty. Our goal is to provide complete peace of mind by ensuring every shipment is managed with professionalism, accountability, and unwavering attention to detail.

As we continue to grow, our ambition remains clear—to become one of India's most trusted and respected logistics partners by delivering innovative, dependable, and value-driven transportation solutions. Guided by our commitment to Connecting Possibilities. Delivering Excellence., we are dedicated to building long-term relationships and supporting the continued growth of businesses across the nation.

leadership.title: Leadership built on real industry experience
leadership.intro: Delayed shipments, poor communication, and inefficient transportation planning are among the biggest challenges businesses face today. At Shipmate Logistics, our experienced leadership team is committed to overcoming these challenges through proactive planning, efficient coordination, and transparent communication.
leadership.names: Mr. Mohit Sharma and Mr. Rahul Indora
leadership.outro: Our goal is simple—to provide dependable logistics services that keep your business moving with confidence.
points: On-time and reliable deliveries
Optimized transportation planning
Quick resolution of operational challenges
Transparent shipment updates
Cost-effective logistics solutions

mission.title: Reliability is a design choice, not an accident
mission.subtitle: Every process at Shipmate — from route planning to driver training — is built around one outcome: cargo that arrives when we said it would.

pillars.title: Plan the route before the load
pillars.text: Routes are mapped, timed and checked against live traffic and weather data before a truck ever leaves the yard.

pillars.title: Maintain before it fails
pillars.text: Every vehicle follows a fixed preventive maintenance calendar — not a reactive repair schedule.

pillars.title: Train the driver, not just license them
pillars.text: All drivers complete a defensive-driving and cargo-handling program before their first solo run.

pillars.title: Track everything, hide nothing
pillars.text: Live GPS, e-PODs and temperature logs are shared with clients in real time — not on request.

items.title: Punctuality
items.text: We treat delivery windows as commitments, not estimates.

items.title: Transparency
items.text: Clients see what we see — live location, ETAs and exceptions.

items.title: Safety
items.text: Zero-tolerance policies on driver fatigue, vehicle defects and overloading.

items.title: Accountability
items.text: Every shipment has a named operations owner from pickup to delivery.

hero.title: Freight solutions for every load, lane and timeline.
hero.subtitle: Whether you're shipping a single pallet or a factory's worth of inventory, Shipmate has a service tier built for it.

list.title: Full Truckload (FTL)
list.summary: Dedicated trucks for high-volume shipments that need a direct, single-consignor route.
points: Door-to-door dedicated vehicle, no consolidation
Choice of 14ft to 40ft trailers and containers
Ideal for factory-to-warehouse and bulk distribution

list.title: Part Truckload (LTL)
list.summary: Cost-efficient shared-vehicle shipping for smaller consignments without compromising on schedule.
points: Consolidated loads on fixed-frequency routes
Pay only for the space your cargo occupies
Daily departures on major industrial corridors

list.title: Container Movement
list.summary: Full container loads moved on dedicated container trucks across major trade lanes.
points: 20ft and 40ft ISO container movement
Port to warehouse and factory to port routes
Suitable for export-ready and import cargo

list.title: Multi-Axle Vehicle (MAV)
list.summary: High-capacity multi-axle trucks for heavy, bulk or long-distance full loads.
points: Up to 25 tonnes payload capacity
Long-haul inter-state corridors
Ideal for steel, cement, machinery and bulk goods

list.title: Single-Axle Vehicle (SAV)
list.summary: Nimble single-axle trucks for medium loads and routes where large vehicles cannot operate.
points: Up to 9 tonnes payload capacity
Access to narrow industrial zones and smaller towns
Cost-effective for regional and short-haul trips

list.title: Cold Chain Logistics
list.summary: Temperature-controlled transport for pharmaceuticals, perishables and fresh produce.
points: Reefer fleet maintaining -20°C to +25°C ranges
Continuous temperature logging with client access
Trained handlers for regulated and perishable goods

list.title: Express & Time-Definite Delivery
list.summary: Priority routing for shipments with hard deadlines — production lines, events or contractual penalties.
points: Guaranteed delivery windows with priority dispatch
Real-time exception alerts to your operations team
Available on all major metro-to-metro corridors

list.title: Project & Heavy Cargo Movement
list.summary: Planning and execution for oversized, overweight or non-standard industrial loads.
points: Flatbed and low-bed trailers for heavy machinery
Route surveys, permits and escort coordination
Dedicated project manager for each movement

process.title: From quote to delivery in five steps

steps.title: Share your shipment details
steps.text: Tell us your origin, destination, load type and timeline through our contact form or dispatch line.

steps.title: Receive a quote
steps.text: Our team responds with a rate and vehicle recommendation, usually within two working hours.

steps.title: Confirm and schedule
steps.text: Once confirmed, we assign a vehicle and driver and share the pickup window.

steps.title: Track in real time
steps.text: Follow your shipment's live location and status from pickup to delivery.

steps.title: Receive e-POD
steps.text: A digital proof of delivery is shared the moment your cargo is signed for.

hero.title: 1000+ vehicles, maintained on a fixed schedule.
hero.subtitle: Every vehicle in the Shipmate fleet is GPS-enabled, inspected before each trip, and matched to the right cargo type — so your shipment travels in the right vehicle, not just any vehicle.

standards.title: What every vehicle includes as standard

items.title: Live GPS tracking
items.text: Real-time location shared with clients via tracking link.

items.title: Pre-trip inspection
items.text: 40-point safety and roadworthiness check before every dispatch.

hero.title: Let's plan your next shipment.
hero.subtitle: Share your route and cargo details, and our dispatch team will get back to you with a quote within one working hours.

form.title: Request a quote
